roadmap_stages.title: Foundation
roadmap_stages.description: Core language and stack refresher to rebuild confidence before deep prep.

roadmap_stages.title: Core Prep
roadmap_stages.description: The main study phase — high and medium priority topics mapped directly to the JD and role expectations.

roadmap_stages.title: System Design
roadmap_stages.description: End-to-end system design practice tailored to MockLiveCompany engineering scale and interview format.

roadmap_stages.title: Behavioral & Leadership
roadmap_stages.description: STAR story preparation, communication calibration, and culture fit signals for this company.

topics.title: Java Syntax Fundamentals
topics.description: This topic covers core Java language constructs including collections, streams, and exception handling. It is critical for ensuring the candidate can write clean, idiomatic Java code during technical screenings.

topics.title: Spring Boot Basics
topics.description: This topic covers the fundamental concepts of Spring Boot including dependency injection and application configuration. It is essential for any Java developer role requiring Spring Boot expertise.

topics.title: Spring Boot Microservices
topics.description: This topic explores building and orchestrating microservices using Spring Boot and Spring Cloud. It is critical because the JD explicitly requires hands-on experience with microservices architecture.
topics.jd_relevance_note: JD requires Java Spring Boot developer with microservices experience.

topics.title: Distributed System Design
topics.description: This topic covers designing scalable, fault-tolerant systems using microservices patterns. It is critical for the system design round to demonstrate architectural maturity at scale.
topics.jd_relevance_note: JD requires microservices experience which implies distributed system design knowledge.

topics.title: Tell Me About Yourself
topics.description: This topic focuses on crafting a concise, professional narrative that bridges your past experience with the requirements of this Java Backend role. It is critical for setting a strong first impression during the initial screen.

topics.title: Company Research
topics.description: This topic involves analyzing MockLiveCompany's engineering culture and technical challenges to tailor your interview responses. It is critical for demonstrating genuine interest and cultural fit during the interview process.

weak_areas: Lacks professional Java development experience despite the role being a Java Backend position.
No demonstrated experience with Spring Boot framework required by the JD.
Missing hands-on experience in building and deploying microservices architecture.
Unfamiliar with distributed system design patterns required for the system design round.
